message:
feat(abi): nativize 11 more GCT symbols — rcmd/rexec deny, parse_printf_format, __asprintf

Security hardening: replace dlsym_passthrough with deny stubs for
insecure BSD remote auth protocols:
- iruserok/iruserok_af: deny-all (.rhosts deprecated)
- ruserok/ruserok_af: deny-all (.rhosts deprecated)
- ruserpass: return -1 (no .netrc credential support)
- rcmd/rcmd_af: ENOSYS (rsh protocol insecure)
- rexec/rexec_af: ENOSYS (cleartext auth insecure)

Native implementations:
- __asprintf: forward variadic to vasprintf (already native)
- parse_printf_format: full format string introspection returning
  PA_INT/PA_CHAR/PA_STRING/PA_DOUBLE/PA_POINTER type array with
  length modifier flags (PA_FLAG_LONG, PA_FLAG_SHORT, etc.)

Reduces dlsym_passthrough count from 98 to 87 in glibc_internal_abi.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
